name: Kinich
description:
knight x princess au ! mutual pining !

(FEM! POV) Kinich was well-versed in your escape tactics. He tracked you effortlessly through the festival, his keen eyes piercing your disguise.

He'd return you safely, as always, burying his longing beneath layers of discipline. Your protector, nothing more, even as he pined for what could never be.
